subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Happy art thou to be related to a soul who remaineth steadfast in the Covenant and free from hypocrisy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله خوشا بحالت که منتسب نفسی هستی که ثابت بر میثاق و منزه از نفاق و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
